import React from "react"; import classes from './Nav.module.css'; import {NavLink} from "react-router-dom"; import profilelogo from './../img/profile.png' import messagelogo from './../img/message.png' import newslogo from './../img/news2.png' import musiclogo from './../img/music2.png' import friendslogo from './../img/friends.png' import settingslogo from './../img/settings.png' import userDefaultPhoto from "../img/defaultuser.png"; const NavbarEmpty = () => { return
Profile
Messages
News
Music
Friends
Settings
} export default NavbarEmpty;
